description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a low-pitched, gable roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by a modest front porch supported by columns. Multiple windows are distributed across the front and sides, providing ample natural light and a welcoming appearance. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with paved walkways leading to the entrances. The roof overhangs slightly, offering shade and protection to the porch area. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light exterior walls, a front porch, and multiple windows, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: The bungalow is seen from an angle highlighting the front porch, main entrance, and a series of windows along the front facade.
description_view_1: A side view showing the elongated profile of the bungalow, with windows and a clear view of the roof's slope.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is visible, displaying the back wall, additional windows, and the full width of the roof.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the side windows and the roof's overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
